Brand_Subtitle: P L A Y  Y O U R  W A Y
Security_ProtectedDataDescription: Passwords are stored in Windows Credential Manager, never in the profiles file.
Servers_CatalogDescription: Official catalog with local cache and instant search.
Servers_SearchPlaceholder: Search by server name or code...
Servers_EmptyDescription: Try another name, number, or platform.
Session_ReadyDescription:
Select an account and a server.
You can play with multiple accounts at the same time.
Credentials_RememberPassword: Keep/save password in Windows Credential Manager
Session_IsolationCaption: Each account runs isolated and appears in a tab inside the launcher.
Layout_FourTooltip: Split into up to four accounts
Detached_FooterHint: ·  Detached window; closing docks it again
Credentials_Stored: Password protected in Windows Credential Manager
Credentials_PasswordSavedPlaceholder: Password saved in Windows Credential Manager
Runtime_DetectedDetail: Everything is ready to open the game.
Runtime_MissingDetail: The game could not be prepared on this computer.
Server_RecommendedTooltip: Last server used with this profile.
Settings_LoadFailed: Local preferences could not be loaded; using defaults.
Profiles_LoadFailed: Local profiles could not be loaded.
Session_AlreadyActiveMessage: The account was already open; the existing tab is now focused.
Session_ChooseServerAndLogin: Choose an available server and enter the account email/username.
Runtime_NotAvailable: The game could not be prepared on this computer.
Auth_PasswordRequiredMessage: Enter this account's password or select a profile with a saved credential.
Auth_SavedPasswordRejected: The saved password was not accepted. Enter it again; with save enabled, it will be updated after login.
Game_ProfileUpdateFailed: The game opened, but the saved profile could not be updated.
Game_CredentialSaveFailed: The game opened and the profile was updated, but the password could not be saved in Windows.
Game_CancelledMessage: The login attempt was cancelled without saving the password.
Game_StartFailedMessage: The game could not be opened. Check your connection and try again.
Auth_CredentialRejected: The username or password could not be confirmed. Enter the password again; social-login accounts are not supported yet.
Auth_UnsupportedPlatform: This version is not available yet.
Auth_InvalidServer: This server is not available right now.
Auth_HttpError: The platform rejected the login request. Try again in a moment.
Auth_NetworkError: The platform could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
Auth_Timeout: The platform took too long to respond. Try again.
Auth_ResponseTooLarge: The platform response exceeded the safety limit.
Auth_InvalidResponse: The platform returned an invalid authentication response.
Auth_InvalidLaunch: The game session returned by the platform could not be recognized.
Auth_OriginNotAllowed: The platform redirected to an address that is not allowed.
Auth_SevenWanUnavailable: The 7wan catalog was recognized, but its servers are closed by the platform.
Auth_NotConfirmed: The platform did not confirm this account. Check the username and password.
Auth_NotConfirmedCode: The platform did not confirm this account ({0}). Check the username and password.
Catalog_ShowingCache: No remote response; showing cache from {0:g}.
Catalog_LoadFailed: The servers could not be loaded. Try refreshing again.
Profile_RequiredFields: Enter a profile name and the account email/username.
Profile_SavedWithCredential: Profile saved. If selected, the password is now in Windows Credential Manager.
Profile_SavedWithoutCredential: Profile saved, but Windows Credential Manager rejected the password change.
Profile_SaveFailed: The local profile could not be saved.
Profile_Deleted: The profile and its associated credential were deleted.
Profile_DeleteFailed: The profile and its credential could not be deleted.
Profile_NewMessage: New profile: choose the platform and server, then enter the login.
Profile_EditMessage: Edit only the data you want to change, then save the profile.
Profile_EditCancelled: Editing cancelled; no changes were saved.
Donation_Body: Urus Launcher took time, care, and a great deal of dedication to become fast and pleasant to use. If it improved your game, you can help keep the project moving forward.
Donation_Joke: Help us buy a few diamonds — and keep improving the launcher while we're at it. Any amount supports development.
Donation_ScanHint: Open PayPal and scan the code. Any amount helps.
Donation_QrIntegrity: QR shown in its original form
Donation_PixKeyTooltip: Selectable PIX key for manual copying
Donation_PixCopiedAutomation: PIX key copied to the clipboard
Donation_PixCopyFailed: Could not copy it. Select the key manually.
Donation_PixCopyFailedAutomation: Failed to copy the PIX key
Update_CurrentDetail: You already have the latest version.
Update_AvailableDetail: See what's new or update whenever you want.
Update_CloseSessions: Close active game accounts before updating.
Update_FailedDetail: The network or release did not respond. You can keep playing.
Update_SessionWarning: Updating restarts the launcher and closes any game accounts still running.
Update_ActionTooltip: Download, verify, and install this update
